improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."/>
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"/>
<meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with 3 free searches."/>
<meta property="og:type" content="website"/>
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-gideon-preview.jpg"/>
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/"/>
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"/>
<meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"/>
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited AI support from US$2/day."/>
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly stating the product value and low-barrier entry point. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. Including the free trial and price anchors expectations and attracts qualified traffic.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three free searches — no credit card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces the product by name and clarifies its purpose, building trust and recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) while emphasizing the risk-free trial with 'three free searches' and removing friction with 'no credit card required.' This approach is direct, benefit-driven, and encourages immediate action without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30% with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free to paid, it reduces uncertainty, sets expectations, and reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace) while naturally presenting pricing. This builds trust and smooths the conversion path.
